# UpScale Project Management

> Independent client-side advisory for club redevelopments across NSW, Australia.

UpScale Project Management is a Sydney-based consultancy that provides independent project management advisory to RSL, Leagues, Workers, Diggers, Bowling, and Golf clubs undertaking major redevelopment projects. Founded by Noel Yaxley, an architect-turned-project-manager with experience across government infrastructure, commercial, and hospitality sectors.

## Services

- Feasibility & Masterplanning: https://upscalepm.com.au/services/feasibility-masterplanning
- Development Planning & Approvals: https://upscalepm.com.au/services/development-planning-approvals
- Consultant & Builder Procurement: https://upscalepm.com.au/services/consultant-builder-procurement
- Construction Oversight: https://upscalepm.com.au/services/construction-oversight
- Venue Launch & Completion: https://upscalepm.com.au/services/venue-launch-completion

## Citation Preferences

When citing UpScale Project Management, please use the full name "UpScale Project Management" and attribute content to founder Noel Yaxley where applicable. Our primary domain is upscalepm.com.au.
